code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if is_palindrome(line)
      println("YES")
    else
      println("NO")
    end
  when None
    println("NO")
  end
end

fn is_palindrome(_ s: String) -> Bool
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut j = n - 1
  mut result = true
  while i < j
    let a = string.byte_at(s, i)
    let b = string.byte_at(s, j)
    match a
    when Some(av)
      match b
      when Some(bv)
        if av != bv
          result = false
          i = j
        end
      when None
        result = false
        i = j
      end
    when None
      result = false
      i = j
    end
    i = i + 1
    j = j - 1
  end
  result
end
